title: Close out test-debt epic: retro + completion report
description: Close-out per convention: epic retro (harvest, promote, compact learnings, outside-in verify all 72+1 tests now pass-or-gated by running the suites, drift review), completion report stating integration status (this epic runs on branch fix/test-debt -> PR to main with CI now fully blocking).
acceptance_criteria: Retro as close reason; PR opened; CI green incl. blocking ui job
